Class Monster

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.AbstractMonster
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.Monster
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ControllableMonster, ReadableMonster
Direct Known Subclasses:
EggBoxMonster
public class Monster extends AbstractMonster implements ControllableMonster
